purpose: Trace the Workflow Brain proposal intake path from JSON paste, validation, optimizedWorkflow import preview, stale protection, and malformed proposal rejection.

assertions: Proposal Diff exposes Brain proposal intake in the browser UI.
A valid nexus.workflowPro.brainReviewProposal.v1 object validates as accepted.
The optimizedWorkflow is shown as ready.
Import optimized workflow sends only optimizedWorkflow into the existing Workflow Pro import path.
Candidate nodes remain 13 and candidate edges remain 12.
Graph does not mutate immediately; explicit apply remains required.

evidence.manualNote: R118 pasted a valid Brain proposal in Chrome on localhost, validated it, imported the optimized workflow, and observed the existing import/apply preview gate.

assertions: After an accepted validation, editing the textarea changes the proposal state to stale.
Stale state shows optimized workflow as none.
Stale state disables Import optimized workflow.
The UI tells the operator to revalidate before importing.

evidence.manualNote: R119 accepted a valid proposal, changed the textarea to a malformed JSON object, and observed stale state before revalidation.

assertions: A malformed proposal can be revalidated from the UI.
Required fields are reported through validator errors.
Rejected state keeps optimized workflow as none.
Rejected state keeps Import optimized workflow disabled.

evidence.manualNote: R119 revalidated the malformed JSON object and observed rejected state with five issues and disabled import.

remainingGaps: Proposal diff scoring can become richer than structural counts.
Future browser automation can turn this manifest into a fully automated screen run.
